nodes.label: Solaar Rule Editor
nodes.description: Solaar's Rule Editor window allowing users to define custom input rules that map device key events to system key presses. Contains 'Save changes' and 'Discard changes' buttons.

nodes.label: User-defined Rules
nodes.description: The top-level 'User-defined rules' section in Solaar's Rule Editor. Contains multiple rules each with a Key condition and a Key press action.

nodes.label: Rule: Haptic Button → Kando Shortcut
nodes.description: Solaar rule: when Haptic (01A0) is pressed, send key press Super_L + Shift_L + F1 — used to trigger the Kando pie menu via the Logitech MX Keys S Haptic key.

nodes.label: Rule: Mouse Gesture Button (press) → Super_L
nodes.description: Solaar rule: when Mouse Gesture Button (00C3) is pressed, send Super_L (depress). Part of a press/release pair to simulate holding the Super key.

nodes.label: Rule: Mouse Gesture Button (release) → Super_L release
nodes.description: Solaar rule: when Mouse Gesture Button (00C3) is released, send Super_L (release). Completes the Super key hold simulation.

nodes.label: Rule: Forward Button (press) → Shift_L
nodes.description: Solaar rule: when Forward Button (0056) is pressed, send Shift_L (depress).

nodes.label: Rule: Forward Button (release) → Shift_L release
nodes.description: Solaar rule: when Forward Button (0056) is released, send Shift_L (release). Completes the Shift key hold simulation via mouse forward button.

nodes.label: solaar-rules-editor.png
nodes.description: Screenshot of the Solaar Rule Editor showing 5 visible user-defined rules: (1) Haptic→Super_L+Shift_L+F1, (2) Mouse Gesture Button pressed→Super_L depress, (3) Mouse Gesture Button released→Super_L release, (4) Forward Button pressed→Shift_L depress, (5) Forward Button released→Shift_L release (partially visible).
